en.text: from a comparative of G5495 and τείνω (to stretch); to be a hand-reacher or voter (by raising the hand), i.e. (generally) to select or appoint

senses.gloss_en: from a comparative of G5495 and τείνω (to stretch); to be a hand-reacher or voter (by raising the hand), i.e. (generally) to select or appoint
